sections.paragraph:
Original: מל מואל מול מוּל

Transliteration: mûl môl mô'l mûl

Phonetic: mool

BDB Definition:

  1. front (noun masculine)
    1. front
    2. in the opposite direction
  2. in front of (preposition)
    1. in front of
    2. (with prefix)
      1. towards the front of, to the front of, on the front of
      2. from the front of, off the front of, close in front of, on the forefront of

Origin: from H4135

TWOT entry: 1160

Part(s) of speech:
